Interface PluginManager

public interface PluginManager
Main interface for managing plugins. Provides high-level operations for plugin lifecycle management.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<PluginDescriptor>
    getAllPlugins()
    Gets all loaded plugins.
    ExtensionRegistry
    getExtensionRegistry()
    Gets the extension registry.
    Optional<Plugin>
    getPlugin(String pluginId)
    Gets a plugin by its ID.
    Optional<PluginDescriptor>
    getPluginDescriptor(String pluginId)
    Gets a plugin descriptor by plugin ID.
    void
    initialize()
    Initializes the plugin manager.
    PluginDescriptor
    loadPlugin(Class<? extends Plugin> pluginClass)
    Loads and registers a plugin from the classpath.
    void
    shutdown()
    Shuts down the plugin manager and all plugins.
    void
    startPlugin(String pluginId)
    Starts a plugin by its ID.
    void
    stopPlugin(String pluginId)
    Stops a plugin by its ID.
    void
    unloadPlugin(String pluginId)
    Unloads and destroys a plugin.

  • Method Details

    • loadPlugin

      PluginDescriptor loadPlugin(Class<? extends Plugin> pluginClass) throws PluginException
      Loads and registers a plugin from the classpath.
      Parameters:
      pluginClass - the plugin class to load
      Returns:
      the plugin descriptor
      Throws:
      PluginException - if loading fails

    • startPlugin

      void startPlugin(String pluginId) throws PluginException
      Starts a plugin by its ID.
      Parameters:
      pluginId - the plugin ID
      Throws:
      PluginException - if the plugin doesn't exist or start fails

    • stopPlugin

      void stopPlugin(String pluginId) throws PluginException
      Stops a plugin by its ID.
      Parameters:
      pluginId - the plugin ID
      Throws:
      PluginException - if the plugin doesn't exist or stop fails

    • unloadPlugin

      void unloadPlugin(String pluginId) throws PluginException
      Unloads and destroys a plugin.
      Parameters:
      pluginId - the plugin ID
      Throws:
      PluginException - if the plugin doesn't exist or destruction fails

    • getPlugin

      Optional<Plugin> getPlugin(String pluginId)
      Gets a plugin by its ID.
      Parameters:
      pluginId - the plugin ID
      Returns:
      the plugin, or empty if not found

    • getPluginDescriptor

      Optional<PluginDescriptor> getPluginDescriptor(String pluginId)
      Gets a plugin descriptor by plugin ID.
      Parameters:
      pluginId - the plugin ID
      Returns:
      the plugin descriptor, or empty if not found

    • getAllPlugins

      List<PluginDescriptor> getAllPlugins()
      Gets all loaded plugins.
      Returns:
      list of all plugin descriptors

    • getExtensionRegistry

      ExtensionRegistry getExtensionRegistry()
      Gets the extension registry.
      Returns:
      the extension registry

    • initialize

      void initialize() throws PluginException
      Initializes the plugin manager.
      Throws:
      PluginException - if initialization fails

    • shutdown

      void shutdown() throws PluginException
      Shuts down the plugin manager and all plugins.
      Throws:
      PluginException - if shutdown fails
